important_dates.document verification date: To be notified along with result

application_fee.details: The notification does not mention any application fee for HAL ITI Apprentices Selection 2026-27. Candidates are advised to check the official portal http://59.89.119.210/trg for any fee-related updates before applying online.

age_limit.details: The crucial date for age calculation is 30/06/2026. Age relaxation is admissible as per the Apprentices Act for reserved categories.

post_wise_qualification.post_name: Fitter, Turner, Machinist, Machinist Grinder, Welder, Electronics Mechanic, Electrician, Instrument Mechanic, Electroplater, Refrigeration/AC, Draughtsman Mechanical, Sheet Metal Worker, COPA/PASAA
post_wise_qualification.essential_qualification: Fitter, Turner, Machinist, Machinist Grinder, Welder, Electronics Mechanic, Electrician, Instrument Mechanic, Electroplater, Refrigeration/AC, Draughtsman Mechanical, Sheet Metal Worker, COPA/PASAA

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the date of application. Only Indian citizens are eligible to apply. Candidates who are already pursuing or have completed apprenticeship training under the Apprentices Act are NOT eligible. Candidates who have one year or more work experience in any organization are also NOT eligible. Courses done through correspondence mode are not eligible for the selection process. | Technical Qualification | Note: Candidates who passed ITI under Centre of Excellence (COE) are NOT eligible for the selection process. | Educational Qualification

salary_details.pay_scale: As per rules during Apprenticeship Training

selection_process: Selection will be based purely on merit. No written test or interview is conducted. The merit list will be prepared by adding 70% weightage to the percentage obtained in High School and 30% weightage to the percentage obtained in ITI. Only provisionally selected candidates will be called for Document Verification at the Technical Training Centre on a date to be declared along with the result. An offer for one year apprentice training will be given only after successful document verification.
86.45% will NOT be considered as 86.5%). If the result is in CGPA

equivalent percentage (correct to two decimal places) as per the board/council certified conversion formula shall be filled. List of provisionally selected candidates will be declared on or before 10 July 2026 on the website http://59.89.119.210/trg.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the HAL portal at http://59.89.119.210/trg. No other mode of application will be accepted. Incomplete forms will not be accepted. The application link will be active from 15 June 2026 at 09:00 AM and will close on 30 June 2026. Candidates should search for http://59.89.119.210/trg website to find the application link.

After filling in basic details on the website ("Enroll Basic Details"), candidates will receive a Registration Number which must be noted immediately for future use. Thereafter, candidates must complete the full online registration form, upload photograph and signature, and submit the form with all required information on the website.
All relevant certificates (High School, ITI pass certificate/marksheet, category certificates, etc.)
Dependants of working/superannuated/deceased HAL employees must upload Dependent Declaration Form certified by the HR officer of the respective Division.
Documents to be Produced at the Time of Document Verification (Originals):
ITI Pass Certificate and marksheet (NTC issued by NCVT/SCVT)
SC/ST/OBC/EWS/PwD certificate (as applicable) in prescribed format
Police Verification Certificate from the Commissioner/Superintendent of Police of the candidate's place of residence (to be submitted at the time of joining apprenticeship training)
All documents uploaded during online application
important_instructions: Only Indian citizens are eligible to apply. Online applications only - no other mode of application will be accepted; incomplete forms will not be accepted. Candidates already pursuing or who have completed apprenticeship training under the Apprentices Act are NOT eligible. Candidates who passed ITI under Centre of Excellence (COE) are NOT eligible for the selection process. Candidates with "Appearing" or "Result Awaited" status in ITI are NOT eligible - Pass Certificate must be in hand as on date of application. Candidates with pending Back Papers or awaited Supplementary Exam results are NOT eligible. Candidates with one year or more of work experience in any organization are NOT eligible. Courses done through correspondence mode are NOT eligible for selection. Candidature will be immediately rejected on canvassing. Candidature can be rejected at any stage (before or after selection) if candidate is found ineligible as per rules - without any prior information. HAL reserves the right to cancel the advertisement or selection process at any time without giving any reason. HAL reserves the right to change the date of the selection process schedule; any changes will be published on the website. Stipend will be payable during apprenticeship training as per rules. Candidates must obtain a Police Verification Certificate from the Commissioner/Superintendent of Police from the place where they reside and submit it at the time of joining apprentice training after successful document verification. Decision of HAL management regarding the selection will be final.

faq.question: Q1. What is HAL Lucknow ITI Apprentices Selection 2026-27?
faq.answer: HAL Lucknow ITI Apprentices Selection 2026-27 is a recruitment drive by Hindustan Aeronautics Limited (HAL), Accessories Division, Lucknow – Technical Training Centre, for selecting ITI-passed candidates for one year of Apprentice Training across various trades under the Apprentices Act 1961, vide Notification No. HAL-ADL/2652/26/02/TRG dated 13.06.2026.

faq.question: Q2. Which trades are eligible for HAL Lucknow ITI Apprentices Selection 2026-27?
faq.answer: The eligible trades are: Fitter, Turner, Machinist, Machinist Grinder, Welder, Electronics Mechanic, Electrician, Instrument Mechanic, Electroplater, Refrigeration/AC, Draughtsman Mechanical, Sheet Metal Worker, and COPA/PASAA. ITI must have been passed through NCVT/SCVT from Government or affiliated institutions.

faq.question: Q3. What is the last date to apply online for HAL Lucknow ITI Apprentices 2026-27?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for HAL Lucknow ITI Apprentices Selection 2026-27 is 30 June 2026. The application window opens on 15 June 2026 at 09:00 AM. Candidates are advised to apply well before the closing date.

faq.question: Q4. Which ITI pass years are eligible for HAL Lucknow Apprentice Recruitment 2026-27?
faq.answer: Only candidates who passed ITI in the years 2021, 2022, 2023, 2024, or 2025 are eligible. Candidates with "Appearing" or "Result Awaited" status are NOT eligible. Candidates with pending Back Papers or awaited Supplementary Exam results are also NOT eligible.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for HAL Lucknow ITI Apprentices Selection 2026-27?
faq.answer: Candidates should not be above 27 years of age as on 30/06/2026. Age relaxation of 5 years is given to SC/ST candidates, 3 years to OBC candidates, and 10 years to Disabled (PwD) candidates as per the Apprentices Act.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for HAL Lucknow ITI Apprentices 2026-27?
faq.answer: Selection is purely merit-based. The merit is calculated by adding 70% weightage to the High School percentage and 30% weightage to the ITI percentage. No written test or interview is conducted. Provisionally selected candidates are called for Document Verification at HAL Technical Training Centre, Lucknow.

faq.question: Q7. Where can I apply online for HAL Lucknow ITI Apprentices Selection 2026-27?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply only through the official HAL recruitment portal at http://59.89.119.210/trg. No other mode of application is accepted. Candidates should search for this URL on their browser to access the application link.

faq.question: Q8. Are candidates who passed ITI under Centre of Excellence (COE) eligible for HAL Lucknow Apprentice Selection 2026-27?
faq.answer: No. Candidates who passed ITI under the Centre of Excellence (COE) scheme are explicitly NOT eligible for the HAL Lucknow ITI Apprentices Selection 2026-27 process.

faq.question: Q9. When will the provisional selection list for HAL Lucknow ITI Apprentices 2026-27 be declared?
faq.answer: The list of provisionally selected candidates will be declared on or before 10 July 2026 on the official website http://59.89.119.210/trg. Document Verification date and time will also be announced along with the result.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any stipend during HAL Lucknow ITI Apprenticeship Training 2026-27?
faq.answer: Yes. Stipend will be payable during the one year of apprenticeship training as per applicable rules. Candidates are advised to check with HAL (Contact: 0522-2350955 between 08:00 to 16:00 hrs) for the current stipend amount applicable as per the Apprentices Act.
